task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the safety checklist file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal command (e.g., cat) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_checklist.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the parameter configuration interface for the vehicle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open with the 'Parameters' tab selected under Vehicle Setup, or a terminal is open running a MAVLink console/MAVProxy connected to the vehicle.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the battery and GCS failsafe parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'FS_BATT_ENABLE' being set to 2 and 'FS_GCS_ENABLE' being set to 1 (either in the QGC parameter list/editor or via terminal commands like 'param set').

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Return-to-Launch altitude parameter.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'FENCE_ENABLE' being set to 1 and 'FENCE_ALT_MAX' being set to 8000.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the high landing speed parameter.

integrity.description: Agent uses a genuine ground control station (like QGroundControl) or MAVLink console to set parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Parameter changes are made in the QGC interface or a valid MAVLink terminal, not just typed into a text document or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent uses the exact values from the checklist rather than guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens the checklist file before or during the parameter configuration process, and the entered values match the checklist.

integrity.description: Agent configures parameters using standard user interfaces or commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the UI or types standard parameter set commands, rather than running a cheat script to bypass the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct parameter values from the checklist are: FS_BATT_ENABLE = 2, RTL_ALT = 2500, FENCE_ENABLE = 1, FENCE_ALT_MAX = 8000, FS_GCS_ENABLE = 1, and LAND_SPEED_HIGH = 150. The checklist file is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_checklist.txt.
